description_long: This is a modern, two-story house set within a landscaped rectangular lot, surrounded by a low boundary wall. The house features a flat roof, large windows, and a clean, geometric facade with white exterior walls. The property includes a spacious driveway, a garage, and a main entrance with a black awning and decorative columns. The backyard is equipped with a swimming pool, a patio area with outdoor furniture, and is bordered by a variety of trees and flowering shrubs. The garden is well-maintained, with green lawns and ornamental plants distributed throughout the lot. A small outbuilding or pool house is visible near the pool, adding to the functional outdoor space.
description: A modern, two-story white house with a flat roof, large windows, and landscaped gardens, featuring a pool, driveway, and garage within a walled lot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with a black awning, symmetrical windows, and landscaped garden with trees and shrubs.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard with a swimming pool, patio area, and a small outbuilding, surrounded by greenery.
description_view_2: Driveway and garage view, displaying the main vehicle entry, double garage doors, and a wide paved area.
description_view_3: Side view focusing on the driveway, side garden, and the main entry steps with decorative landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and some grouped in horizontal bands
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a black awning, double doors, decorative columns, and a small set of steps leading to a paved path
